name: Mandel Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together potato starch, cake meal, matzo meal, salt, and cinnamon.
2. Beat eggs and sugar in a bowl until well combined. Add oil and beat again.
3. Gradually add the sifted dry ingredients and chopped nuts to the egg mixture, blending well.
4. Refrigerate the dough for a while.
5. Lightly oil a cookie sheet.
6. Shape the dough into 3 x 1 inch rolls and place on the prepared cookie sheet.
7. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 30 minutes, or until lightly browned.
8. Cool slightly before slicing the rolls.
9. Place the sliced rolls, cut side up, back in the hot oven. Turn off the heat.
10. Let stand in the oven until lightly browned and crisp. Optionally, add one tablespoon of lemon or orange rind instead of cinnamon.
